name: SendSafely REST API
description: The SendSafely REST API provides programmatic access to SendSafely for sending and receiving encrypted files. The API uses API key and HMAC signature-based authentication. The base URL is your SendSafely host (e.g. https://companyname.sendsafely.com or https://www.sendsafely.com) followed by /api/v2.0.
